response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in full-stack development with experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the job requirements. Their experience with various technologies and contributions to open-source projects demonstrate their technical capabilities and versatility.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with multiple programming languages and technologies
Strong background in full-stack development and software craftsmanship
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Basic knowledge of German might be a limitation in a German-based team
No direct mention of experience with AI agent development beyond MCP code generators
